theater_description: Iraqi Al-Hussein missile bombardment of Tehran during a 52-day 1988 wave within the War of the Cities. Civilian exposure is city-specific; no valid military-theater denominator was recovered for the same window.
geometry_method_note: Civilian denominator is city-specific, anchored to Tehran's 1986 census population rather than Iran's national population.
military_area_note: No publishable Tehran-specific military exposure denominator was recovered. The bundle therefore does not publish dr_v1_direct.
civilian_area_note: Civilian denominator starts from Tehran's 1986 population and applies bounded temporary-flight adjustments based on reports that substantial numbers fled the city during the missile wave.
split_reason: No broader War of the Cities roll-up is used because the dedicated Tehran 1988 source is materially stronger than a multi-city aggregate for denominator matching.
quality_note: Civilian numerator is strong and city-matched, but the military-side path was not recovered, so only a fallback civilian intensity metric is published.
